title: Porsche 912
cardDescription: Comprehensive recordings of a vintage Porsche 912 as well as a boutique restoration garage.
description: Comprehensive recordings of a vintage Porsche 912 as well as a boutique restoration garage. Recorded in collaboration with Stereoscope and Classic Porsche Restoration, who gave us unrivaled access to a 1968 Porsche 912.

title: Workbench
cardDescription: Over 400 samples including tools, twine, latches, and impacts.
description: Over 400 samples including tools, twine, latches, and impacts. Collected using common workbench items.

title: Ambiences
cardDescription: Background library covering winds, machines, factories and wide range of ambiences.
description: Background library covering winds, machines, factories and wide range of ambiences. Ranging from city to rural.

title: Creatures and People
cardDescription: Over two hundred sounds including a variety of animal vocalizations and creature elements.
description: Over two hundred sounds including a variety of animal vocalizations and creature elements.

title: Household
cardDescription: A grab bag of 370 FX created with common household and garage items.
description: A grab bag of 370 FX created with common household and garage items. Zippers, rubber bands, bikes, toys, newspapers, hard drives, chairs, and oh so many buttons.

title: Synthesis and Sound Design
cardDescription: A small collection of electronic FX and video game inspired cues.
description: A small collection of electronic FX and video game inspired cues. Created with my collection of synthesizers and modular systems.

title: Production Checklist
cardDescription: Customizable to-do lists for packing, setup and wrap.
description: A gear management app built with event and film production in mind. Upload a personal library of your cases and kits, then color code and organize them into common shoots. Automatically generate packing, setup, and wrap checklists based on what's needed for each job. Optional $20/year Pro subscription keeps everything in sync across your phone, tablet, and desktop.
